# ANALYSIS: RIBBON_GATE_VIX_OOS_ANALYSIS

**Filed:** 2026-06-01
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** quality_gate
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The RIBBON_GATE quality filter may have varying effectiveness across different VIX regimes. By logging VIX at the time of trade and analyzing OOS performance by VIX bands (LOW <15, MID 15-22, HIGH >22), we can assess whether the gate is regime-dependent and adjust its parameters if necessary.

## Mechanism

The RIBBON_GATE is an existing quality gate in the engine that filters trades based on ribbon conditions (specifics not detailed in the prompt). For this analysis, we will run a Stage-1 OOS backtest of the engine with the RIBBON_GATE active, logging the VIX value (from the 5m bar at entry) for each trade. We will then aggregate the P&L and win rate for trades falling into each VIX band.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** $25K+ account required for full qty=28 (as per OP-20 disclosure 1 in the leaderboard examples). For $1K paper account, qty scales to ~14% of headline.
2. **Sample bias:** The OOS sample is defined by the walk-forward window used in the Stage-1 backtest. Selection method: chronological out-of-sample. Overfit risk: mitigated by walk-forward validation and real-fills check.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (Stage-1 backtest not yet run)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (Stage-1 backtest uses BS-sim; real-fills validation required for top 3 J days)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest; max drawdown: unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest; blow-up scenario: if RIBBON_GATE is too permissive in high VIX, could lead to large losses during volatile regimes.
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (if top-5 days = X% of P&L, state X)

## Pre-merge gate

Stage-1 backtest must pass gym validators, walk-forward (OOS/IS ratio >=0.5), and real-fills check on top 3 J days (diff < ±20%).

3 / 10 -- No backtest results available yet; confidence pending OOS analysis.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not propose a change to the engine, so it does not conflict with any existing candidates. It may inform future quality_gate candidates (like V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE or ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE) by providing VIX-stratified performance.
